name: Boiled Crawfish -- Justin Wilson
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring seasonings to a boil for 10 minutes.
2. Add potatoes, corn, and smoked sausage; continue boiling for another 10 minutes.
3. Add crawfish and return to a boil.
4. Turn off the heat immediately. Let soak for 20 to 30 minutes.
5. Drain and peel. Eat.
Note: While the water is coming to a boil, cull and clean the crawfish by rinsing them well with a garden hose and removing any dead ones. Always wear gloves when handling crawfish, as they can still pinch through gloves.
